item.title: Memory Upgrade
item.description: User: Hi, I have a screw driver and the memory here. I’ve undocked the laptop and have it bottom up. Me: Great! Lets get started. Go a head and locate a small panel on the back of the computer with the letter M next to it. User: I don’t see anything here. What’s Strike Zone? There is a little thing here that says WIndows XP. Could t be on the side of the computer?
